mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_member ( member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_addr, member_tel, withdraw_yn, member_role ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberTel}, #{withdrawYn}, #{memberRole} )
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_addr, member_tel, regist_date, withdraw_yn, withdraw_date, member_role FROM tb_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT member_id, member_name, member_addr, member_tel, regist_date, withdraw_yn, member_role FROM tb_member WHERE 1=1
AND member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY regist_date DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{pageUnit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_member WHERE 1=1
AND member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
